notes: Alternative discounts for active military, SNAP, EBT, MA teachers, and MA residents with IDs.
raw: The library’s pass admits up to 4 people with a 50% discount off regular admission rates to all four HMSC museums. Full admission prices and hours vary by museum - please go to https://hmsc.harvard.edu/ for more information before your visit. The library pass does not guarantee admission on a chosen date. Alternative discounts are available for active military, SNAP, EIB, MA teachers, and MA residents with IDs.

source_phrases.notes: Alternative discounts are available for active military, SNAP, EIB, MA teachers
